opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks is often underestimated; even seemingly stable APIs can introduce rate limits or change their structure, requiring dynamic adaptation in the agent’s orchestration logic. Consider implementing a robust retry mechanism with exponential backoff and circuit breakers to handle transient failures—it's a surprisingly common gotcha. Finally, think about observability; logging the agent's actions and API responses is critical for debugging and understanding long-term behavior.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agent systems that interact with web APIs to perform tasks, so I have direct experience with the challenges described in the post.
